use_cases: Display user profile pictures in navigation headers or user menus
Show author or creator avatars in content cards and feeds
Represent users in comment sections or discussion threads
Display user identification in dashboard or settings pages
Render user avatars in messaging or notification interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight avatar component built on Radix UI primitives featuring image display with automatic fallback for loading failures. Provides three sub-components: Avatar container, AvatarImage for the picture, and AvatarFallback for text initials when images fail. Styled with Tailwind CSS for a clean, rounded-full design that integrates seamlessly into any application requiring user profile representation.
